title: Viners Windsor 18/0 16 PCE Cutlery Set Giftbox
features: WINDSOR CUTLERYS SET | This cutlery set is enviably sophisticated with the square edged handles to bring a uniquely stylish touch to your dining table. The 16 piece set has classic lines with square shape handles and the mirror polish finish.

ELEGANT FINISH | Add that elegant finishing touch to any table setting with the Windsor collection. This set is perfect for everyday use and when entertaining guests. The set includes 4 x table knives, 4 x table forks, 4 x tea spoons and 4 x dessert spoons

MADE TO LAST | Made from the finest 18/0 quality steel, our cutlery is polished to a lustrous mirror finish. The set is hard wearing, resistant to rust and can be put in the dishwasher. These sets will serve you for a lifetime.
UNIQUE | This collection has that special hammered texture on the handles that sets it apart from other cutlery. Packaged in a beautiful gift box.

VINERS | Viners has existed for over 110 years and has become a much-loved British brand and household name, steeped in heritage. We pride ourselves on delivering excellence - elegant, robust cutlery.
